name: simulate_mandelbrot
description: Runs a local JAX-accelerated Mandelbrot simulation and returns entropy, boundary complexity, coordinates, zoom, and iteration settings.

center_real.description: Real coordinate of the viewport center.

center_imag.description: Imaginary coordinate of the viewport center.

zoom.description: Positive zoom factor for the Mandelbrot viewport.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations used for the escape-time calculation.
